flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Ozarka College are 14% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($29.3k vs $34.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Ozarka College fell 68% between 2009 and 2010 (33.8% → 10.9%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Ozarka College rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.4k → $6.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Ozarka College rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.0k → $3.8k).
